message:
shared,cli: Add secret redaction for transcript uploads

- Add 1,648 secret detection patterns from secrets-patterns-db plus
  custom patterns for AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.), JWT, and
  modern services
- Implement length-preserving redaction that masks secrets with * while
  keeping JSON structure valid
- Redact both raw transcript and unified transcript before upload
- Add script to fetch and update patterns from upstream

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/xbdbyb8j4e6cgvnhf5izjday
